en: Harvey Dent never made it home. Of course not.
ko: 하비 덴트는 집에 돌아가지 못했어. 당연하지.

en: What have you done with him? Me?
I was right here. Who did you leave him with?
Assuming, of course, that they are still your people and not Maroney's.
Does it depress you, Commissioner, to know just how alone you really are?
ko: 외롭다는 걸 아는 게 우울해, 경찰청장님?

en: Does it make you feel responsible for Harvey Dent's current predicament?
ko: 하비 덴트의 현재 상황에 책임감을 느끼게 해?

en: Where is he? What's the time?
What difference does that make? Well, depending on the time, he may be in one spot or several.
